name: Storage TV Stand for TVs up to 43" Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Display your TV and media collection on this TV Stand with Storage for TV's up to 43" from Room Essentials™. This TV stand with storage makes a practical addition to your living room or entertainment area. It features a sleek rectangular shape to bring modern style to your interior, and a neutral color that coordinates with any decor. The four open shelves provide plenty of room for storage of media essentials and decorative accents, while the flat tabletop offers the ideal space for a television up to 43-inches. Plus, the two holes on the back of the unit offer easy cable management for your media players. For help with assembly, please refer to the assembly video that can be found within the image carousel above.
"Overall Width: 40 inches
Overall Depth: 15 inches
Overall Height: 20 inches
Depth of Shelves: 14 inches
Width of Shelves: 19 inches"
